ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Thien Tam Thi Tran, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter is ordered off-calendar, Petitioner to file an Amended OSC and to publish the OSC with proper name.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
